data.title: Tron Inc. increased its holdings of TRX tokens by 154,494.
data.description: Tron Inc. announced on the X platform that it acquired 154,494 TRX tokens today at an average price of $0.3236, bringing its total TRX holdings to over 693 million. The company aims to continue increasing its Tron DAT inventory to enhance long-term shareholder value.

data.title: Tron Inc Expands TRX Holdings with Recent Acquisition
data.description: Tron Inc announced on the X platform that it has acquired 154,494 TRX tokens at an average price of $0.3236. According to Odaily, this acquisition increases the company's TRX holdings to over 693 million tokens. Tron Inc aims to enhance long-term shareholder value by continuing to increase its Tron DAT inventory.

data.title: Israeli Prime Minister Expresses Shock Over White House Correspondents' Dinner Incident
data.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu expressed his shock on social media today, April 26, regarding the 'security incident' that occurred at the White House Correspondents' Dinner on April 25. According to Odaily, Netanyahu described the event as an attempted assassination of U.S. President Donald Trump. He also commended the U.S. Secret Service for their swift and decisive response.

data.title: The Prime Minister expressed shock at the shooting at the White House dinner.
data.description: Today (April 26), Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu posted on social media, expressing his shock at the "security incident" that occurred at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner on April 25. In his post, he called the incident an attempted assassination attempt against US President Trump and expressed his respect for the swift and decisive action of the US Secret Service. (CCTV International News)

data.title: Polymarket Prediction on League of Legends Match Sees Significant Bet
data.description:
A recent prediction event on Polymarket, focusing on the 'League of Legends T1 vs. BNK FEARX' match, saw a notable transaction. According to Odaily, an account with a 60% win rate (address: 0xd24cb20148ce4a4c994aa6e0664ee98e6a545809) invested $44,000 in favor of T1 defeating BNK FEARX just two minutes before the match began, with an opening price of 28 cents.

The contract rules for this event specify that if T1 wins against BNK FEARX in the first and second rounds of the LCK league, the outcome will be 'T1.' Conversely, if BNK FEARX wins, the result will be 'BNK FEARX.' In cases where the match is canceled, ends in a draw, or is postponed for more than seven days without a result, the outcome will be a 50-50 split. If the match starts but is not completed, and one side wins due to the opponent's forfeit, disqualification, or default, the result will favor the winning side.

data.title: A 60% win rate account purchased for $44,000 in League of Legends: T1 defeated BNK FEARX.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket "League of Legends T1 vs. BNK FEARX" prediction event, an account with a 60% win rate (address: 0xd24cb20148ce4a4c994aa6e0664ee98e6a545809) purchased $44,000 worth of bets on T1 defeating BNK FEARX two minutes before the match started, at an opening price of 28¢. The contract rules for this event are as follows: for the LCK League Round 1 and Round 2 match between T1 and BNK FEARX, if T1 defeats BNK FEARX, the result is "T1"; if BNK FEARX defeats T1, the result is "BNK FEARX". If the match is canceled (not played), ends in a draw, or is postponed for more than 7 days without a winner, the result is 50-50. If a match begins but is not completed, and one side wins by forfeit, disqualification, or without a fight, the winner is declared the victor. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Hong Kong Financial Secretary Highlights ETF Benefits for Diversified Investment
data.description: Hong Kong Financial Secretary Paul Chan emphasized the advantages of exchange-traded funds (ETFs) linked to digital assets and other popular themes, describing them as efficient and transparent investment tools. According to NS3.AI, Chan noted that global investors are increasingly diversifying their asset allocations to minimize reliance on a single market or asset. He highlighted that ETF-linked assets now encompass a range of sectors, including precious metals, technology companies, semiconductor firms, and digital assets.

data.title: Paul Chan: ETFs on themes such as digital assets provide investors with highly transparent investment tools.
data.description: Hong Kong Financial Secretary Paul Chan published a personal essay titled "Gathering Greater Energy Through Innovation and Cooperation," in which he pointed out that global investors are accelerating the diversification of their asset allocation, reducing their reliance on single markets and single assets. As investment market hotspots develop, the types of assets linked to exchange-traded funds (ETFs) are continuously increasing, ranging from spot and futures precious metals; technology companies; semiconductor companies; to digital assets, etc. These ETFs with different themes or combined with different leverage characteristics provide investors with efficient and highly transparent investment tools.

data.title: China-Iran Trade Turnover Declines by 56.7% Amid De-Dollarization Efforts
data.description: Trade turnover between China and Iran has decreased significantly, according to data from China's General Administration of Customs. The figures reveal a 56.7% drop in trade activities between the two nations. During the second quarter reporting period, Chinese imports of Iranian products were valued at $415.5 million. According to NS3.AI, the upcoming BRICS summit in New Delhi may see China, Russia, and Iran advocating for further de-dollarization efforts.

data.title: Hong Kong Financial Secretary Highlights Diversification in Global Investment
data.description: Hong Kong Financial Secretary Paul Chan Mo-po has released an essay titled 'Harnessing Greater Energy Through Innovation and Cooperation.' According to Odaily, Chan emphasized that global investors are increasingly diversifying their asset allocations to reduce reliance on single markets or assets. As investment market themes evolve, the range of assets linked to exchange-traded funds (ETFs) continues to expand. These assets now include spot and futures of precious metals, technology companies, semiconductor firms, and digital assets. Such diverse ETFs offer investors efficient and transparent investment tools.

data.title: Hong Kong Leads Global IPO Fundraising in 2026, Finance Chief Says
data.description:
Hong Kong's Financial Secretary, Paul Chan, announced on April 26 that the city's IPO fundraising has continued to lead globally this year, following last year's success. According to Jin10, as of last week, Hong Kong's IPO fundraising exceeded HKD 140 billion. Since March, the average daily turnover of Hong Kong stocks has surpassed HKD 280 billion, demonstrating the resilience of Hong Kong's financial market despite global uncertainties.

With the upcoming May Day Golden Week in China, the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region's Immigration Department anticipates approximately 980,000 mainland visitors during the holiday period, marking a 7% increase compared to the same period last year. The government plans to enhance support and manage crowds at popular attractions to improve visitor experiences, benefiting sectors such as dining and retail.

data.title: Arkham: Ethereum Foundation unstaking $48.9 million worth of ETH; market attention focused on whether further sales will occur.
data.description: On-chain analytics platform Arkham published an article on its X platform stating that the Ethereum Foundation has unstaking approximately $48.9 million worth of ETH. Tracking data shows that the Ethereum Foundation has deposited WSTETH into the unstETH contract on Lido, and will receive the corresponding ETH upon completion of the unlocking process. Market focus is on whether the Ethereum Foundation will further sell the ETH released from this unstaking. Previously, the Ethereum Foundation has repeatedly sold ETH for operational fund management, raising ongoing concerns about potential selling pressure.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Unstakes $48.9 Million Worth of ETH
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation has unstaked approximately $48.9 million worth of ETH, according to Foresight News. On-chain analysis platform Arkham reported that the foundation has deposited WSTETH into Lido's unstETH contract, awaiting the completion of the unlocking process to receive the corresponding ETH.

Market observers are closely monitoring whether the unstaked ETH will be sold following the completion of the unlocking process.

data.title: Crypto Fraud Cases Highlighted in Midday Roundup
data.description:
A recent midday roundup focused on significant developments in crypto-related fraud cases. According to NS3.AI, the U.S. Department of Justice has sentenced an individual to 70 months in prison for orchestrating a $263 million cryptocurrency fraud scheme. This case underscores the ongoing challenges in combating financial crimes within the digital currency sector.

Additionally, the roundup reported on a case in Hong Kong involving police investigations into fraud and money laundering activities linked to virtual currency. The estimated amount involved in this case is HK$7 million, highlighting the global nature of cryptocurrency-related criminal activities and the efforts by law enforcement agencies to address them.

data.title: The suspect in the White House correspondents' dinner shooting admitted that his target was Trump administration officials.
data.description: According to CBS News: The suspect in the White House correspondents' dinner shooting has admitted that his targets were Trump administration officials. (Jinshi)

data.title: Suspect Admits Targeting Trump Administration Officials in Shooting Incident
data.description: A suspect involved in the shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner has confessed to targeting officials from the Trump administration. According to Odaily, the admission was reported by CBS News, highlighting the suspect's intention to focus on members of U.S. President Donald Trump's team.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 78,000 USDT with a 0.79% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 26, 2026, 05:14 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 78,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 78,109.992188 USDT, with a narrowed 0.79% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Analysts say $80,000 is the first effective resistance level for BTC; a break above $82,000 could lead to increased volatility.
data.description: Crypto analyst Murphy, writing on the X platform, stated that considering three sets of data (Options Gamma Exposure, Options Open Interest by Strike Price, and Options ATM Implied Volatility), the impact on BTC from an options perspective is as follows: $80,000 is currently the first effective resistance level above BTC. This level simultaneously possesses the conditions of high Call OI, positive Gamma, and low IV. When the price pushes upwards, market makers' dynamic hedging can easily create selling pressure; and the lower the IV, the higher the marginal sensitivity of market makers' hedging adjustments. Therefore, the thickness of this wall (OI of 7,200 BTC + positive Gamma) makes $80,000 a "tough nut to crack" in May. Once it breaks through and approaches $82,000, due to the larger negative Gamma (OI of 4,644 BTC), the market may quickly switch from being suppressed to a "amplified volatility" mode.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Comments on Presidency's Risks After Shooting Incident
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump remarked on the dangers associated with the presidency following a shooting incident related to the White House Correspondents' Dinner. According to NS3.AI, Trump expressed his determination not to live in fear despite the risks. He humorously noted that if Marco Rubio had cautioned him about the potential for violence earlier, it might have influenced his decision to run for office.
